title: cyperus tabularis var. humilis
intro: Cyperus tabularis var. humilis, also known as Dwarf Papyrus or Dwarf Sedge, is a type of plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus tabularis var. humilis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
